pending.body: `bin/rb-lite` does not fingerprint symlink worktree content correctly. At line 113 it skips any path where `[[ -f $path ]]` is false, so dangling symlinks and symlinks to directories have no worktree content in the fingerprint; at line 115 it hashes symlink targets via `sha256sum` rather than the symlink text Git stores. If an implementer retargets an already-dirty symlink, `git status` and the index can remain unchanged while the actual git diff changes, causing the loop to declare stability too early. Hash symlink contents explicitly, for example by detecting `[[ -L $path ]]` and hashing `readlink "$path"` with an unambiguous prefix instead of following or skipping the link.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 3 -> Plan and Implement
